hero.title: Where Every Cup Tells a Story
hero.subtitle: Carefully sourced beans, expertly roasted, and brewed to order. Come as you are, stay as long as you like.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Seasonal ingredients, timeless recipes. Everything made fresh, every morning.
menu.label: Menu

about.title: Rooted in Community, Driven by Craft
about.body1: Brewed and Co. started as a small corner cart in 2018, born from a simple belief: great coffee should be accessible, unhurried, and shared. We source our beans directly from family-run farms in Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala.
about.body2: Every cup is a collaboration between the farmer who grew it, the roaster who shaped it, and the barista who brought it to life. We are proud to be your neighborhood's third place.
about.body: We roast small batches of ethically sourced beans and craft each cup with care. Our cozy space is perfect for work, meetings, or just a moment of peace.
about.label: About Us

contact.title: Come Say Hello
contact.body: Visit us at 427 Oak Street or reach out anytime. We're open 7am–6pm daily.
contact.label: Get in Touch

cta.body: Order ahead and skip the line.
cta.title: Your favorite coffee, ready when you are
